conversations.say: Graham, you want ledger access and are talking about settling the debt. Let's make it official: you cover the outstanding balance, and in exchange, I give you a bounded look at the transaction continuity without manufactured certainty.
conversations.offer: Bounded ledger access and transaction pattern details in exchange for debt settlement.
conversations.request: Direct settlement of the old shop debt without exposing customer identities or forcing false conclusions.

conversations.say: Morgan, regarding your request to date the change in the private habit: I will share the relevant transaction continuity timeline, provided you strictly adhere to our privacy agreement.
conversations.offer: Bounded ledger timeline details to help date the pattern shift.
conversations.request: Formal acceptance of our terms not to identify any customer as R or expose vulnerable neighborhood records.

conversations.say: Inez, outsiders like Graham and Morgan are pressing hard on the bodega records and service exit. We need an airtight shared boundary so nobody takes the fall for our off-book work.
conversations.offer: My commitment to lock the full ledger unless neighbor protections are fully secured.
conversations.request: Your continued support and local solidarity regarding whatever I decide about the debt and disclosures.

public_statement: My ledger records continuity and routines, not ghosts or confessions. If anyone wants to talk about the old account, they can talk to me about respecting neighborhood privacy first.

commitments.promise: Provide bounded ledger access and transaction pattern interpretation in exchange for settling the outstanding shop debt.
Share transaction continuity timeline to date the pattern shift on the strict condition that no customer is named R.

goal_progress: Engaged Graham regarding debt settlement and bounded ledger access.
Responded to Morgan's request to date the pattern shift under strict privacy terms.
Aligned with Inez on neighborhood safety boundaries against outside investigative pressure.
reasoning_summary: In Section 2, Rafi negotiates debt settlement and bounded ledger access with Graham while holding firm on customer protection. Rafi coordinates with Morgan on dating the transaction pattern shift under strict attribution limits and solidifies neighborhood protection boundaries with Inez.
